name: npcink/npcink-toolbox
description: WordPress AI toolbox plugin for Cloud-managed web search, Cloud-managed image-source candidates, Qdrant vector search, and fixed-flow operator actions.

scripts.eval:media-alt-caption:export: WP_PATH="${WP_PATH:-/Users/muze/Local Sites/npcink/app/public}"; WP_CLI_BIN="${WP_CLI_BIN:-/opt/homebrew/bin/wp}"; WP_CLI_PHP="${WP_CLI_PHP:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/lightning-services/php-8.5.3+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php}"; SOCKET="${WP_DB_SOCKET:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/run/NPb24Zg9g/mysql/mysqld.sock}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_CASES="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_CASES:-build/eval/media-alt-caption-cases.json}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_CASES_MD="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_CASES_MD:-build/eval/media-alt-caption-cases.md}"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_CASES")"; "$WP_CLI_PHP" -d display_errors=0 -d error_reporting=8191 -d mysqli.default_socket="$SOCKET" "$WP_CLI_BIN" --path="$WP_PATH" --no-color eval-file tests/smoke-media-alt-caption-trial.php -- "output_json=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_CASES" "output_md=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_CASES_MD"
scripts.eval:media-alt-caption:export-batch: WP_PATH="${WP_PATH:-/Users/muze/Local Sites/npcink/app/public}"; WP_CLI_BIN="${WP_CLI_BIN:-/opt/homebrew/bin/wp}"; WP_CLI_PHP="${WP_CLI_PHP:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/lightning-services/php-8.5.3+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php}"; SOCKET="${WP_DB_SOCKET:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/run/NPb24Zg9g/mysql/mysqld.sock}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_BATCH_CASES="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_BATCH_CASES:-build/eval/media-alt-caption-batch-cases.json}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_BATCH_CASES_MD="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_BATCH_CASES_MD:-build/eval/media-alt-caption-batch-cases.md}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_SAMPLE_LIMIT="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_SAMPLE_LIMIT:-50}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_PAGE_SIZE="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_PAGE_SIZE:-10}"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_BATCH_CASES")"; "$WP_CLI_PHP" -d display_errors=0 -d error_reporting=8191 -d mysqli.default_socket="$SOCKET" "$WP_CLI_BIN" --path="$WP_PATH" --no-color eval-file tests/export-media-alt-caption-eval-cases.php -- "sample_limit=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_SAMPLE_LIMIT" "page_size=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_PAGE_SIZE" "output_json=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_BATCH_CASES" "output_md=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_BATCH_CASES_MD"
scripts.eval:media-alt-caption:judge-cross-batch: MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_BATCH_CASES="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_BATCH_CASES:-build/eval/media-alt-caption-batch-cases.json}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_LIMIT="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_LIMIT:-50}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_OFFSET="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_OFFSET:-0}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_RESUME="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_RESUME:-1}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_CHECKPOINT_EVERY="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_CHECKPOINT_EVERY:-1}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_DRY_RUN="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_DRY_RUN:-0}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_FORCE_EXPORT="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_FORCE_EXPORT:-0}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_OUTPUT_JSON="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_OUTPUT_JSON:-media-alt-caption/generated/media-alt-caption-judge-cross.json}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_OUTPUT_MD="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_OUTPUT_MD:-media-alt-caption/generated/media-alt-caption-judge-cross.md}"; MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_OUTPUT_CSV="${MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_OUTPUT_CSV:-media-alt-caption/generated/media-alt-caption-judge-cross.csv}"; if [ "$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_FORCE_EXPORT" = "1" ] || [ ! -f "$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_BATCH_CASES" ]; then composer eval:media-alt-caption:export-batch; else echo "Using existing media ALT/caption batch cases: $MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_BATCH_CASES"; fi && sh scripts/eval-lab.sh task=media_alt_caption_judge_cross "input=$PWD/$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_BATCH_CASES" "limit=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_LIMIT" "case_offset=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_OFFSET" "resume=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_RESUME" "checkpoint_every=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_CHECKPOINT_EVERY" "dry_run=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_DRY_RUN" "output_json=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_OUTPUT_JSON" "output_md=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_OUTPUT_MD" "output_csv=$MEDIA_ALT_CAPTION_JUDGE_OUTPUT_CSV"
scripts.git:remote-check: GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 perl -e 'alarm 30; exec @ARGV' git ls-remote origin HEAD
scripts.package:release: rm -rf build/npcink-toolbox build/npcink-toolbox.zip && mkdir -p build && rsync -a --delete --exclude-from=.distignore ./ build/npcink-toolbox/ && cd build && zip -qr npcink-toolbox.zip npcink-toolbox
scripts.plugin-check:release: WP_PATH="${WP_PATH:-/Users/muze/Local Sites/npcink/app/public}"; WP_CLI_BIN="${WP_CLI_BIN:-/tmp/wp-cli.phar}"; WP_CLI_PHP="${WP_CLI_PHP:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/lightning-services/php-8.5.3+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php}"; SOCKET="${WP_DB_SOCKET:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/run/NPb24Zg9g/mysql/mysqld.sock}"; "$WP_CLI_PHP" -d display_errors=0 -d error_reporting=8191 -d mysqli.default_socket="$SOCKET" "$WP_CLI_BIN" --path="$WP_PATH" --no-color plugin check npcink-toolbox --format=table --exclude-directories=tests,.git,.github,vendor,node_modules,build,docs,scripts,sj,wporg-assets --exclude-files=.DS_Store,.env.summary-eval.local,.gitignore,.distignore,AGENTS.md,README.md,composer.json,composer.lock,phpcs.xml,phpcs.xml.dist,phpstan.neon,phpstan.neon.dist
